summary: Comprehensive testing of sukunaW Gaming Platform completed. Identified and FIXED critical React import bug affecting game and admin components. All core functionality now working. Backend: 27/27 tests passed. Frontend: All major features working after fix.

fixed_critical_bugs.issue: React import missing - 'React is not defined' error preventing game and admin panel from loading
fixed_critical_bugs.fix_applied: Added React import to App.js: 'import React, { useState, useEffect, createContext, useContext } from "react";'
fixed_critical_bugs.impact: Game and admin panel now fully functional

passed_tests: User registration with unique username validation
User login with correct credentials
Admin login (pseudotamine/synapthys5082_) with isAdmin=true verification
Admin badge display and admin panel access
Dashboard shows bonuses section with claim buttons
Daily bonus claim functionality (50 coins)
Weekly bonus claim functionality (300 coins)
Bonus cooldown validation (prevents duplicate claims)
Dodge game - navigation and canvas loading (FIXED)
Game canvas is visible and responsive
Game controls (WASD/arrow keys) working
Shop - all 4 items display correctly (custom_role, custom_gradient, create_clan, clan_category)
Shop purchase validation and insufficient funds handling
Transfer coins between users functionality
Transfer form validation and error handling
Admin panel - add coins to users (FIXED)
Admin panel - user management and list display
Profile page displays user stats and purchase history
All navigation working (Главная, Играть, Магазин, Перевод, Профиль, Админ)
Russian language UI throughout the application
Navbar displays user level, coins, and username correctly
Logout and login flow functionality
All backend API endpoints (27/27 tests passed)
Authentication and authorization flows
Game score submission with anti-cheat validation
Shop purchase and inventory management
Bonus system (daily/weekly) with proper cooldowns
Admin user management and coin distribution
User data persistence and level calculations

success_percentage.frontend: 100% (all major features working after critical fix)
